info.title: Xemelgo Webhooks
info.description: Outbound webhook events Xemelgo sends to your registered endpoint. Each entry is an event Xemelgo POSTs to you.

post.description: Sent when an asset bulk-update operation completes. The payload contains the updated assets.

2XX.description: Return any 2xx status to acknowledge receipt.

post.description: Sent when a new asset is created. The payload contains the full asset, including its type and any custom properties.

2XX.description: Return any 2xx status to acknowledge receipt.

post.description: Sent when an asset cycle count is submitted. Provides item-level detail and aggregate counts per asset type.

2XX.description: Return any 2xx status to acknowledge receipt.

post.description: Sent when an asset cycle count is submitted. Provides aggregate counts per asset type only (no item-level detail).

2XX.description: Return any 2xx status to acknowledge receipt.

post.description: Sent when a tracked asset is detected at or moved to a new location. The payload contains the full asset, including its current and last-detected locations.

2XX.description: Return any 2xx status to acknowledge receipt.

post.description: Sent when an inventory audit is submitted. Provides item-level detail and aggregate counts per inventory part.

2XX.description: Return any 2xx status to acknowledge receipt.

post.description: Sent when an inventory audit is submitted. Provides aggregate counts per inventory part only (no item-level detail).

2XX.description: Return any 2xx status to acknowledge receipt.

post.description: Sent when an inventory bulk-update operation completes. The payload contains the updated inventory items.

2XX.description: Return any 2xx status to acknowledge receipt.

post.description: Sent when an inventory item is marked as consumed. The payload contains the full inventory item with its consumed state and date.

2XX.description: Return any 2xx status to acknowledge receipt.

post.description: Sent when a new inventory item is created. The payload contains the full inventory item, including its part and any custom properties.

2XX.description: Return any 2xx status to acknowledge receipt.

post.description: Sent when an inventory cycle count is submitted. Provides item-level detail and aggregate counts per inventory part.

2XX.description: Return any 2xx status to acknowledge receipt.

post.description: Sent when an inventory cycle count is submitted. Provides aggregate counts per inventory part only (no item-level detail).

2XX.description: Return any 2xx status to acknowledge receipt.

post.description: Sent when an inventory item is detected at or moved to a new location. The payload contains the full inventory item, including its current and last-detected locations.

2XX.description: Return any 2xx status to acknowledge receipt.

post.description: Sent when a previously consumed inventory item is returned to stock. The payload contains the full inventory item with its restored state.

2XX.description: Return any 2xx status to acknowledge receipt.

post.description: Sent when a new package is created. The payload contains the full package and any custom properties.

2XX.description: Return any 2xx status to acknowledge receipt.

post.description: Sent when a package is detected at or moved to a new location. The payload contains the full package, including its current and last-detected locations.

2XX.description: Return any 2xx status to acknowledge receipt.

post.description: Sent when a new work order is created. The payload contains the full work order and its properties.

2XX.description: Return any 2xx status to acknowledge receipt.

post.description: Sent when a work order is detected at or moved to a new location. The payload contains the full work order, including its current and last-detected locations.

2XX.description: Return any 2xx status to acknowledge receipt.
